name: IRC_TN_JOB_APPLICATIONS
description: This is the table for storing job applications by an agent on Talent Network.

columns.Name: JOB_APP_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: SUBSCRIBER_ID
columns.Comments: To store the subscriber id. Foreign Key to IRC_TN_SUBSCRIBERS.

columns.Name: TN_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: To store the TN job id. Foreign Key to IRC_TN_JOBS_B.

columns.Name: AGENCY_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the AGENCY_ID of the Agent who submitted the candidate job application. Foreign key to IRC_TN_AGENCIES table.

columns.Name: AGENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the AGENT_ID of the Agent who submitted the candidate job application. Foreign key to IRC_TN_AGENTS table.

columns.Name: APPLICATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date when this job application was submitted.

columns.Name: ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the talent network job application is active or not.

columns.Name: FA_SUBMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the SUBMISSION_ID of the requisition's submission.

columns.Name: FA_CANDIDATE_NUMBER
columns.Comments: The person id related to the candidate that is stored in the IRC_CANDIDATES table.

columns.Name: FA_REQUISITION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Stores the REQUISITION_NUMBER from IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table.

columns.Name: FA_CURRENT_PHASE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the current phase of the job application.

columns.Name: FA_CURRENT_STATE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the current state of the job application.

columns.Name: FA_APPLICATION_LANGUAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the language code for the job application.

columns.Name: TN_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Talent Network Job Application Status as a lookup code.

columns.Name: FA_PUBLIC_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores the status which is shown to the external.

columns.Name: FA_ACTIVE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the FA job application is active or not.

columns.Name: FA_CONFIRMED_FLAG
columns.Comments: This flag is used to determine whether job application is confirmed or not.

columns.Name: CANDIDATE_LAST_NAME
columns.Comments: To store the Candidate's Last name.

columns.Name: CANDIDATE_FIRST_NAME
columns.Comments: To store the Candidate's First name.

columns.Name: CANDIDATE_EMAIL
columns.Comments: To store the Candidate Email.

columns.Name: OBJECT_STATUS
columns.Comments: Indicates the status of the object.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_NAME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the package name of the job that created or last updated the row.
